title: CV2 Internal Structure
description:
CV2 Internal Structure

Internal Structure of CV2

How to remove the top cover

(1) Remove the screw 1 on the CV2 rear face.

(2) Loosen the screw 2 on the CV2 rear face.

(3) Slide the top cover toward the rear side while slightly lifting it up.
